economic_notes: GBEs include Roseau River Anishinabe Limited Partnership (Niichi Oasis Gaming Centre), 5002818 Manitoba Ltd., Highway 6 Oasis Ltd., Kiinu Oasis Gaming Centre, 10002085 Manitoba Ltd., 10019238 Manitoba Ltd., 10026446 Manitoba Ltd., 10026448 Manitoba Ltd., Tie Creek Construction Limited Partnership, Tie Creek Construction Inc. The 1903 Trust holds an RBC loan of $11,462,500 as of March 31, 2023 with annual principal installments of $1,637,500.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 — auditor report signed April 22, 2025, which is unusually late (over 2 years after year-end). 9 entities fully consolidated on line-by-line basis; 10 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. GBEs reported a combined net loss of $364,592 for the year. Revenue includes deferred revenue adjustments (deferred from prior year $6,485,793 and deferred to following year $7,684,403). Construction in progress of $1,968,388 not included in tangible capital assets net book value. Investments include portfolio investments and GIC totaling $2,038,269 plus equity method investments. The 1903 Trust (external trust) holds an RBC loan of $11,462,500; annual payments to the First Nation from the Trust are committed. expenses_education combines Education ($1,107,956) and Employment and Training ($451,449). No schedule of remuneration provided in extracted text.
